prompt:
[Verse]
I woke up with the sky on fire
A million colors tangled in the wire
Dreams like whispers
They never tire

[Prechorus]
Step by step
The world turns gold
Every shadow’s just a story told

[Chorus]
We’re chasing the sun
We’re chasing the light
Running through the dark till it feels right
Oh
Chasing the sun
Chasing the flame
Every step forward
Never the same

[Verse 2]
I see the road but it’s wrapped in haze
Still I move through these endless days
Hope’s a compass
It lights the maze

[Prechorus]
Heartbeats echo
The rhythm grows
Where it leads us
Only the future knows

[Chorus]
We’re chasing the sun
We’re chasing the light
Running through the dark till it feels right
Oh
Chasing the sun
Chasing the flame
Every step forward
Never the same
title: Chasing the Sun
tags: soft, warm pads, soft vocal, modern pop, warm, vocal, 112 bpm, uplifting, uplifting melody. build layers gradually with soft percussion and shimmering synths, pop, creating a feeling of steady growth and boundless optimism.

prompt:
[Verse]
Under the stars we glow so bright
Feet on the ground hearts take flight
Every laugh a spark in the night

[Prechorus]
Feel the beat it’s pulling us near
Every step we lose the fear
Together we shine it’s crystal clear

[Chorus]
We shine we shine brighter than the sun
We run we run till the night is done
Together we’re one together we’re free
This is our time our unity

[Verse 2]
Echoes of joy bounce through the air
Smiles like confetti everywhere
No one alone we all share

[Prechorus]
Feel the rhythm it’s calling you
Every moment something new
Together we rise like morning dew

[Chorus]
We shine we shine brighter than the sun
We run we run till the night is done
Together we’re one together we’re free
This is our time our unity
title: Our Time
tags: edm, festival-ready with vocal chops, vocal, and a driving 124 bpm rhythm. builds with layered synths and euphoric drops, creating an anthemic celebration of friendship and unity., bright plucks, bright, feel-good

prompt:
[Verse]
The streetlights hum a quiet tune
Soft shadows waltz beneath the moon
Your hand in mine feels like June

[Chorus]
Sway with me
Slow and sweet
Barefoot whispers
Heartbeats meet
Under the stars
Where time retreats

[Verse 2]
The night wraps us in velvet haze
Each step we take a gentle phrase
Your eyes hold galaxies ablaze

[Prechorus]
No rush
No race
Just this embrace
A moment carved in time and space

[Chorus]
Sway with me
Slow and sweet
Barefoot whispers
Heartbeats meet
Under the stars
Where time retreats

[Bridge]
The breeze sings secrets to the trees
Your laughter dances on the seas
We’re floating free
Just you and me
title: Moonlit Sway
tags: slow, cozy night vibe, warm, mellow keys, warm harmonies, chill pop, lo-fi, pop, lo-fi beat, mellow
